item.title: SAXON Q Launches Commercial Diamond-Based NV-Center Quantum Computing Systems
item.summary: Insider Brief Press release – SAXON Q, a pioneer in diamond-based nitrogen-vacancy (NV) quantum computing, today announces the commercial availability of the 128-qubit SXQ128 and 512-qubit SXQ512 — the first diamond-based NV-center quantum computers to ever exceed 10 qubits. Both systems operate at room temperature with no cryogenic cooling, vacuum equipment or specialized facilities required, offering organizations the ability to run quantum convolutional neural networks (QCNN) and chemistry […]
